title: urginea maritima var. sphaeroidea
intro: Urginea maritima var. sphaeroidea, also known as squill or sea squill, is a bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Urginea maritima var. sphaeroidea include reducing inflammation and relieving congestion, which can lead to improved respiratory function and overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the bulb of the plant is typically dried and powdered, then used in teas, tinctures, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
